# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Active development**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0-unreleased tracks ongoing work not yet shipped in a preview.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **CPU raster shader context restored** — Re-enables SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT in the native build to fix a CPU raster rendering regression introduced in an earlier configuration change. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))
